value.text: 2026-05-29 functional readiness audit: existing in_progress readiness item selected, no new task created. Commands: npm run check PASS; npm test PASS, 2 tests passed; npm run pack:dry-run PASS, tarball dry run listed 9 files and package size 8.7 kB; npm run changelog:check PASS. Hands-on: loaded built dist/index.js with fake pm SDK command registration; temporary pm root generated WIP, blocked, closed, and open items; missing webhook without dry-run failed clearly with guidance to set --webhook or PM_SLACK_WEBHOOK or use --dry-run; dry-run generated WIP 1, blocked 1, done 1, upNext 1 and posted nothing; mocked webhook post returned posted true with standup payload. Secret scan: current tracked high-signal token git grep no hits; current email-like git grep no hits; git history high-signal token scan no hits. Blockers: none from this pass.

value.text: 2026-05-29 release-readiness refresh: package manifest/lock now target @unbrained/pm-cli >=2026.5.29 / ^2026.5.29 and pm-changelog ^2026.5.29-2 where applicable.
